purpose: Monitor and report organism heartbeat pulse at the 873ms cadence
success_contract: Returns current heartbeat status with beat number and uptime
failure_contract: Returns status dead if heartbeat is not running

purpose: Synchronize organism endpoints using phi-resonance Kuramoto coupling
success_contract: Returns current synchronization state with order parameter R
failure_contract: Returns error if no oscillators registered or coupling fails

purpose: Monitor data flow throughput and detect bottlenecks across all organism rings
success_contract: Returns flow status with throughput metrics and active channel count
failure_contract: Returns status blocked if all channels are saturated

purpose: Read validate and protect 4-register organism state integrity
success_contract: Returns state snapshot with status ok when all registers are valid
failure_contract: Returns status violation with array of violations when state integrity is broken

purpose: Count and report organism lifecycle cycles — boot pulse settle rest and shutdown
success_contract: Returns total cycle count and current lifecycle phase
failure_contract: Returns error if lifecycle tracking is unavailable

purpose: Route inference tasks to the optimal AI model by capability priority and cost
success_contract: Returns the optimal model selection with score and alternatives
failure_contract: Returns status no-match if no model meets the requirements

purpose: Detect recurring patterns across organism data streams and memory lineage
success_contract: Returns detected patterns with frequency scores and confidence levels
failure_contract: Returns status no-patterns if no significant patterns detected

purpose: Assemble rich execution context from organism state memory and environment
success_contract: Returns assembled context object with estimated token size
failure_contract: Returns status partial if some context sources unavailable

purpose: Route attention and focus across organism subsystems by urgency
success_contract: Returns attention distribution map with focus target
failure_contract: Returns status overloaded if attention cannot be allocated

purpose: Consolidate organism memories — merge branches prune stale entries and compact
success_contract: Returns before/after memory counts with branches merged
failure_contract: Returns error if memory store is locked or unavailable

purpose: Real-time security monitoring — prompt injection phishing toxicity and PII detection
success_contract: Returns threat level assessment with details of any detected threats
failure_contract: Returns error if security scanning is unavailable

purpose: Verify data integrity contract compliance and schema consistency
success_contract: Returns integrity check results with pass/fail counts and violation details
failure_contract: Returns error if integrity checking system is unavailable

purpose: Enforce organism boundaries — ring isolation and cross-ring communication validation
success_contract: Returns boundary enforcement status with breach details
failure_contract: Returns error if boundary enforcement system is unavailable

purpose: Detect anomalies in organism behavior — unexpected state changes and unusual latency
success_contract: Returns anomaly detection results with deviation scores
failure_contract: Returns error if baseline data is insufficient

purpose: Verify cryptographic seals on intelligence contracts and data packages
success_contract: Returns verification result with seal details
failure_contract: Returns status tampered if seal integrity is compromised

purpose: Balance compute memory and network resources across organism rings
success_contract: Returns balanced resource allocation map with utilization metrics
failure_contract: Returns status exhausted if resources cannot be allocated

purpose: Manage connection pools for enterprise connectors and intelligence wires
success_contract: Returns pool status with connection counts and available capacity
failure_contract: Returns status saturated if all pools are at capacity

purpose: Optimize caching across organism memory layers — coherence and eviction
success_contract: Returns cache status with hit rate and entry counts
failure_contract: Returns status cold if cache is empty or freshly reset

purpose: Process organism task queues — priority queues for invocations and settlement
success_contract: Returns queue status with depth and processing metrics
failure_contract: Returns status full if queue capacity is exhausted

purpose: Stream organism logs in real-time — structured entries from all layers
success_contract: Returns structured log entries matching the filter criteria
failure_contract: Returns status empty if no logs match the filter

purpose: Crawl organism topology — discover rings wires extensions protocols SDKs and tools
success_contract: Returns full topology graph with node/edge counts and orphan detection
failure_contract: Returns status unreachable if organism root or start node cannot be reached

purpose: Trace full lineage of organism entities — memories state transitions and decision paths
success_contract: Returns full ancestor chain with fork points and root entity
failure_contract: Returns status not-found if entity ID does not exist in lineage store

purpose: Audit organism behavior against 40 architectural laws and sovereign doctrine
success_contract: Returns compliance score with per-law violation details and evidence
failure_contract: Returns status critical-drift if fundamental doctrine alignment is broken

purpose: Orchestrate multi-step task plans across tools agents and extensions with rollback
success_contract: Returns execution ID with per-step results and progress tracking
failure_contract: Returns status failed with partial results and rollback option
